text:
The Ritz Family (リッツファミリー, Rittsu Famirī) is a Mafia clan. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 75 

Background

The Ritz Family is an overarching Mafia clan, directly under the order of one of the Ten Dons. The Nostrade Family is associated with this clan. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Immediately after Worm appears in front of the Nostrade bodyguards, he introduces himself and asks what family they are from. Dalzollene answers the Ritz Family and adds that they are bodyguards for Light Nostrade. 

Trivia

The Ritz Family is not mentioned in the 2011 anime adaptation.
